steps.title: Identify the artist's explicit belief
steps.content: The speaker directly quotes the artist's conviction: “Fixed in immortal marble is my fame!” combined with “surely this shall last!” These lines reveal precisely what the artist thought would result from his sculpture.

steps.title: Connect the belief to the answer
steps.content:
Choice C (‘It would bring him enduring fame by withstanding time.’) states that the sculpture would bring enduring fame by withstanding time.

The other options either credit technical mastery, assume restoration would occur, or claim comparative superiority — none of which the artist's thoughts support.
That confirms C is correct.
